music.view.empty: Upload an audio file to render the music base card here.
music.editor.hero.title: Music Base Card
music.editor.hero.desc: Uploading an audio file automatically parses embedded title, artist, cover artwork, and lyrics into the formal fields. A default placeholder cover is shown when no custom cover is uploaded.
music.editor.resources.title: Resources
music.editor.resources.desc: Only the audio file is required. The album cover and lyrics file can be added later, and the cover falls back to a default placeholder when absent.
music.editor.audio.title: Audio File
music.editor.audio.desc: Clicking the rendered card delegates playback to the formal resource-open route.
music.editor.metadata.title: Track Metadata
music.editor.metadata.desc: You can continue to refine the track title, album, language, genre, and release date manually.
music.editor.cover.title: Album Cover
music.editor.cover.desc: You can upload a cover manually. Embedded artwork is also imported automatically when available.
music.editor.cover.hint: Removing a custom cover automatically falls back to the default placeholder art.
music.editor.lyrics.title: Lyrics File
music.editor.lyrics.desc: Upload a lyrics file manually, or let embedded lyrics generate one automatically when present.
music.editor.lyrics.hint: Prefer .lrc or .txt. The config stores only the card-root relative path.
music.editor.team.title: Production Team
music.editor.team.desc: Each role can list multiple people, one per line, which works well for artists, lyricists, composers, arrangers, and more.
music.editor.team.people_hint: Each line becomes one formal person entry when saved.
music.editor.team.empty: No production team has been entered yet. Add a role to begin.
music.editor.errors.import_unavailable: The current host did not provide the formal resource import capability.
music.editor.errors.tiff_conversion_unav: The current host did not provide TIFF-to-PNG conversion for editor cover extraction.
music.editor.errors.delete_failed: Submitting the resource deletion request failed. Please try again.
music.editor.errors.audio_import_failed: Audio import or embedded metadata parsing failed.
